creator: erik@smluc.org
text:
Freshmeat blurb:
	This release has a framebuffer viewer. You can view the front and
	back buffers, plus depth, stencil, and auxiliary buffers as well as
	framebuffer objects. There is also better support for 3D textures in
	the texture viewer, and assorted bugfixes.

No change to pkg-plist

Thanks!
